mapper.sql: gol.id, gol.game_partition_id, gol.guild_id, gol.operator_id, gol.operator_role, gol.operation_type, gol.operation_desc, gol.old_value, gol.new_value, gol.ip_address, gol.created_at, g.name as guild_name, u.nick_name as operator_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guild_operation_log gol LEFT JOIN guild g ON gol.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON gol.operator_id = u.user_id WHERE gol.id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM guild_operation_log WHERE id IN
#{id}
